name: Schitt's Creek
description: The CBC/Pop TV comedy about a wealthy family forced to rebuild their lives in a backwater town

questions.q: Who stars as patriarch Johnny Rose?

source.notes: Also co-created the series with his son Dan.

questions.q: Which Canadian comic actress plays Moira Rose?

source.notes: Famous for Home Alone and Beetlejuice.

questions.q: Who plays the sharp-witted David Rose?

source.notes: Eugene Levy's real-life son; co-creator of the show.

questions.q: Which actress plays the ditzy but lovable Alexis Rose?

source.notes: Replaced Abby Elliott after the unaired pilot.

questions.q: In which country is Schitt's Creek set and produced?

source.notes: Filmed in Ontario; setting is deliberately vague North American.

questions.q: What is the name of the rundown motel the Rose family lives in?

source.notes: Exterior shots filmed at the real Hockley Motel in Mono, Ontario.

questions.q: How many seasons are there of Schitt's Creek?

source.notes: 80 episodes total, from 2015 to 2020.

questions.q: Which Canadian broadcaster originally aired Schitt's Creek?

source.notes: The Canadian Broadcasting Corporation's flagship English TV network.

questions.q: On which U.S. network did Schitt's Creek originally air?

source.notes: CBS Corporation's Pop cable network (now The CW's sister).

questions.q: Which streaming platform is credited with driving the show's U.S. breakthrough?

source.notes: The phenomenon was dubbed the 'Netflix bump'.

questions.q: Who plays the motel clerk Stevie Budd?

source.notes: David's deadpan best friend.

questions.q: Who plays the soulful Patrick Brewer, David's eventual husband?

source.notes: Reid is also a singer-songwriter.

questions.q: Which Canadian town doubled as Schitt's Creek for exterior shots?

source.notes: A small town in Uxbridge Township, Ontario.

questions.q: Who plays the folksy Mayor Roland Schitt?

source.notes: The only American in the main cast.

questions.q: What is the title of Alexis's signature pseudo-musical number?

source.notes: Performed by Annie Murphy; wildly popular online.

questions.q: Patrick serenades whom with an acoustic cover of Tina Turner's 'Simply the Best'?

source.notes: A Season 4 scene that went viral on its own.

questions.q: Which Schitt's Creek cast member is Eugene Levy's real-life daughter?

source.notes: Plays diner waitress Twyla Sands; Dan Levy's sister.

questions.q: At the 2020 Emmys, Schitt's Creek made history by sweeping how many major comedy categories?

source.notes: First comedy or drama to sweep all seven in a single year.

questions.q: Which real-life event inspired the premise of Schitt's Creek?
choices: Kim Basinger's purchase of Braselton, Georgia

source.original_a: Kim Basinger's purchase of Braselton, Georgia
source.notes: Basinger bought the small Georgia town in 1989 for $20 million.

questions.q: What is the name of Moira's community singing group in town?

source.notes: An a cappella group led by Jocelyn Schitt.

questions.q: What was the company whose embezzlement by the Roses' business manager triggered their bankruptcy?

source.notes: A chain of video rental stores.

questions.q: What is the name of the store David and Stevie co-open that later becomes David and Patrick's business?

source.notes: Curated shop featuring artisanal local goods.
